title: [FIRRTL] LowerClasses: support ObjectSubfieldOp
body:
This PR handles the conversion of "reading from an output port" to "reading from a field", by converting firrtl.object.subfield ops to om.object.field ops.

In order to convert object subfield ops from FIRRTL to OM, we need to convert the port index (as encoded in FIRRTL), to a symbol (as encoded in OM).  To do this, we can use the original input object's class type. However, by the time we are converting object subfield ops, the object has already been converted to an om.object, which no longer has this information. So, as we convert each class, we build a table from om class name back to its original firrtl class type, and make use of it in the converter for object subfield ops.
